notes: Minimum post-patch trading days for live sign-off.
Accepted trades should materially reduce bad-trade incidence.
Avoid shrinking the strategy too much.
Good trade gross should mostly survive the filter.
Shadow entry filter must add net PnL.
Do not kill too much winner gross.
Exit layer must add net PnL.
Promotion layer must improve total counterfactual PnL.
Promotion gains should be broad, not one-day only.
Over-promotion losses should stay well below runner gains.
End-to-end stack must beat realized baseline.
Combined stack should improve most days.
Simple recent-stability heuristic for shadow sign-off.
